name: Fujibo Holdings, Inc.
summary: Fujibo Holdings, Inc. engages in polishing pads, chemical industrial products, textiles, and other businesses in Japan. The company provides POLYPAS polishing pads for precision polishing of silicon wafers, as well as for various types of semiconductor materials, metals, and glasses; and functional non-woven fabrics, functional films, as well as cleaning and polishing tapes. It also offers fine chemical intermediates for the production of raw materials for medicines, agricultural chemicals, electronic materials, and functional chemicals. In addition, the company is involved in the export of vehicles and automotive components; recovery and refining of used solvents; operation of solar power generation plant; and trading businesses. Further, it provides functional fiber products. Fujibo Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1896 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
